park_name: Whitsunday Holiday Parks - Queens Beach Bowen

reviews.review_text: Ease of booking, welcoming staff. Super clean and nice size sites.

This park is really nice - great people stay here ! The sites are generous and some shaded. The pool area is a bit bland but the pool size good and always spotless.
The amenities - always clean and can’t fault
Fantastic place to stay for us! Hoping to come back next year for an extended stay.  Thank you.
Everything that I wanted at a good price .Close to the beach and pub

Immaculately kept piece of paradise. You are surrounded by a golf course on one side, a beach in front of you and a playground and green space on the other side. A beautiful, safe park that is whisper quiet and presentation perfect. It has a spotlessly clean swimming pool, bbq gfacilities, 2 camp kitchens, 2 laundries and two ammentities blocks. The grounds are kept neat and tidy. There are gorgeous fig trees for shade and there are plenty of sights without being squished in. I cannot recommend this park enough!. You will not be disapointed!. The swimming pool is absolutely huge although it would benefit from some pool loungers. 5 out of 5. I will definetley be back. Gorgeous, safe swimming beaches, with beautiful sunrises and sunsets. Do yourself a favour and stay at this little piece of paradise!.

Just like an old school caravan park feeling with everything you need & a beautiful pool!  Red tailed black cockatoos were stunning.  Great beach for the dog to run on & get rid of some energy.  Will definitely be back. ☺️
We loved our stay and looking forward in coming back. The park mangers where very complying it is a credit to them how tidy clean and the pool was maintained very well 100% done thank you

Friendly staff, really good rates for powered site, clean sites and amenities
. Next to beach for dog walking and across the road from a good pub restaurant.
Love this park, great location spacious site. Well equipped camp kitchen, laundry great quality washing machines and dryers. Excellent pool . Walking tracks along the beach
Hey I always forget to put you a review ! I spent month there and I fully recommand ! Very good place, lovely owners ! Best experience ever !

Wonderful stay.  Very clean, very modern site with big pool and friendly staff. Quiet but also walkable to beach, golf and a pub and bottle shop.

Only two tiny things I would change is the ability to take the dog to the communal bench area (we were in a tent so always had to have one of us with the dog vs tie her up while we cooked), and the shower heads.

We will definitely be back though!
Great sunrise at Queens Beach Bowen
Great caravan park, clean and well maintained , friendly staff members, lovely swimming pool area,  close to beach, golf course,

This  was a great find in Bowen. I did a walk in booking this week and found the lady on reception friendly, smiling and helpful. The park was quiet as it’s a few weeks before the holiday rush. So there were plenty of shaded sites to choose from. Even though I had a camper trailer I found the sites were spacious and plenty of room to park the car. The park and amenities were nice and clean. I’ll definitely be back.

Very nice campsite, quiet and welcoming. The bathrooms are new, well maintained and clean!
The receptionist was very friendly!
Super kind&friendly receptionist. Super clean and well kept facilities. Close proximity to beach. Highly recommend.

This camp was a pleasent surprise. Well equipped and maintained.
The only thing I can point out is a wery sharp light illuminating the grass area for tents during the night.

We spent a few months here and was absolutely beautiful. Reg and Chantell are amazing, clean amenities, very nice and quiet people in the campsite. Not a place for party backpackers, but the perfect stay for quiet and respectful people. So far our favorite campsite we ever been
Great little park near the beach and playground areas. Very, very clean and tidy. Close to pub and very spacious sites.
Great park stayed before. Looking forward to seeing it again.
Beautiful spot

Our stay itself would be 5 star but unfortunately it was tainted by a rude lady who verbally abused our children for being ‘too loud’ in the pool at 3pm in the afternoon - there was only 5 children in there and our vans were on the opposite side of the toilet block to the pool and we couldn’t hear them. The kids came to told me and the other mother so we went over to sit and watch. While we were there she didn’t say anything to them, so we left briefly, and near immediately she had another crack at them calling my son a ‘little smart arse’. Then when confronted by us proceeded to tell us that they should be in the pool and not making any noise it is disrespectful if they talk or anything in there (they were the only people in the pool area also) she was the rudest person i have encountered in any of our travels.

This van park was great otherwise every other person spoke so nicely and told us how great our kids were and how nice it was to see them playing and chucking a footy etc. Facilities are amazing the shower block near the pool had huge showers and were recently refurbed. well and truly had everything we needed.
Beautiful place, camp kitchen, and BBQs immaculately clean. Swimming pool was also very inviting

Just had a week here, backing the golf course and a view to the ocean. Park has excellent bathrooms that are modern, large and hot showers. Great pool, but could do with a little heat over the winter months. Sites reasonably sized. Just needs to offer wifi for it to be near perfect. For motorhomers who park up, note there is no convenience stores within walking distance.

Great caravan park.
Toilets and showers clean.
Short walk to beach, park and Golf Course.
Most sites are grass and or slab.
Telstra 5g prefect.
Very helpful managers, clean toilet blocks, well maintained grounds. Good location
Quite crowded sites & difficult to reverse van onto the allocated site.
Nice little park. Clean amenities. Not far from town.

Nous sommes venus la un soir, notre véhicule de location avait un problème, le lendemain nous avions l’interdiction de conduire avec pour notre sécurité. La propriétaire du camping nous a demandé de quitter les lieux avant 10h ne voulant pas qu’un véhicule en passe squatte un emplacement de son camping.
Elle a refusé de nous trouver un emplacement pour la suite même à nos frais.
Nous sommes choqués d’un tel comportement.
Could do with some TLC.
Well maintained caravan park next to Golf course and kids play park. Short walk to beach. Ablution was clean.

Amazing location! It’s so close to the beach
The staff is really nice and kind
Between all the campings in Bowen this one has the best swimming pool
Kitchen furniture is new
I will definitely come back!
Very nice spot close to most things went for 2 night and stayed 2 weeks
Staff super kind and helpfull, amenities very clean, bbq and pool were amazing. Super recommended

Very affordable powered site. Spacious. Close to the beach which dogs are allowed. The swimming pool is very big and salt water. Perfect temperature at any time of the day. Amenities are on the older side but very clean. Would stay again.

Great park, lovely staff, amenities nice and clean. Spacious sites with slabs. Will do weekly specials.
Definitely stay again.
Friendly staff, clean amenities, great spot
Clean and tidy park next to the beautiful beach.packed in like sardines though and hard to manoeuvre and park.
Was quiet little place. Was close to beach and playground. Very friendly

A lovely caravan park very close to Queens Beach and the golf club.    Very busy, so best to phone and make a booking ahead.  Amenities are clean.  Two Amenity blocks, one is modern and the other is the original block with very large showers.   Everyone is very friendly.     Pets allowed.
5 nts not park fault but was very windy in the area we were in. Nice pool, facilities  and grounds a little tired.
2 min walk to the beach
Great Van Park, close to beach and facilities very clean
Great spot and close to beach
Very well kept park.
Travelling around Aus and ran into this absolute beauty of a park!! Awesome amenities and really friendly staff made our month long stay a true pleasure! Would definitely recommend!

What a great little park cool breezes in the evening short drive to cbd pri e are very affordable for this time of year 24th may beautiful views at a short walk to the back of the park amenities clean large showers we will be back

Great little park, next to the  golf course across from the beach. The Hotel and bottle shop are just  across the road.
Facilities are good with big shower cubicles.
Clean, friendly, good location and affordable

One of the best caravan parks we've ever stayed at. My partner and I stayed here for a while and had no complaints. It's a one minute walk to the beach and doesn't take long to drive into town. The staff were very nice and welcoming and the winter regulars made our stay even better ❤️
Best park in yown
Great park near to the beach. Great pool that is nice and big and good temperature. Amenities clean. Friendly staff. Great weekly rates. Would stay again

Good caravan park overlooking the golf course. Good sized sites for bigger rigs. Pool. Kids playground beside the park. Pub within walking distance. Clean amenities friendly staff and owners. Special rate at the moment. Happy to return here.  Back again after 3 years. Still immaculate, refurbished ablution block. Still same managers. May have caught them on a bad day but think they may have had enough. 24/7, 365 takes a toll. The park and facilities reflect their hard work on the place . We will be back if this way again.
Great service
Good caravan park. Clean and very well looked after. Good size caravan sites, too.

Always great to stay here. Clean, friendly and great garden set sites on real grass, virtual beachfront and a park that has maintained high standards at a very reasonable price of $32 (powered site) Not money grabbing like the bigger parks with better services than some charging over $50

Very friendly and helpful caretaker. Lovely shady and grassy park with a short walk to access the beach. It's a dog friendly beach, unlike the other beaches nearby. Only $29 for an unpowered site when others wanted $50. Thankyou Whitsunday Council.

The location was absolutely beautiful, and the staff were very friendly and helpful. Beautiful clean amenities and well-kept park with lovely swimming pool, right near the ocean , lovely parks and short stroll to Queens Beach hotel.
Love this caravan park.The managers are awesome,great place to relax.
Nice and clean

Perfect place for travelling around this area. Some tight sites other very spacious. Park not designed for children so PERFECT for couples and grey nomads. Happy campers! Will be back. Staff friendly and very hard working.
Great caravan nice and quiet. But need more rubbish bins around the park.

Nice place & location for all to share.
Recent experiences with three unhygenic backpackers soured this winter. They know who they are (reviews below) and have made it difficult for future backpackers to camp here.
Who in their right mind would think that drying their shoes on the communal BBQ hot plates would be acceplable. No wonder manager and others guests were angry.
Terrible experience, won’t be coming back.
The owner seemed nice, but he isn't
We had to leave because the owner got violent with us one morning

Cannot recommend any higher. Bel and Terry made you feel more than welcome, great camp space , firepot of a night if you like a get together. Or just enjoy your own space. Walk the beach . Gorgeous . We will definitely be calling in and staying a bit longer on our way back. THANKYOU 😊
Site was a bit tight but manageable. Clean amenities. Park is alongside the golf course and beach. A great spot easy walk to the pub and bottle shop. Coffee cart some mornings.
성수기라 풀방이었는데 잔디밭에 자게해주심. 화장실도 깨끗한편이고 괜춘
Nice park .. very friendly great kitchen good location..nice and quiet.
Good  park..considering the size..lovely  location
